tasks.title: Fix SSRF DNS rebinding vulnerability in WebScraper

files_to_modify.description: Implement IP validation after connection establishment

core_functionality: Validate resolved IPs AFTER connection using httpx transport hooks
Block private IPs, localhost, cloud metadata endpoints
testing: Unit tests for DNS rebinding scenarios
Integration tests with mock DNS server
Penetration test with time-delayed DNS responses

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create SSRFProtectionTransport(httpx.HTTPTransport) that validates resolved IPs before request. Check peername() IP against blocked networks.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with DNS server that changes resolution between check and request. Verify metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254) are blocked.
success_metrics: No internal network access via DNS tricks
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - SSRF can expose AWS credentials and internal services

tasks.title: Strengthen command injection sanitization

files_to_modify.description: Enhance ParameterSanitizer.sanitize_command() with Unicode normalization and expanded patterns

core_functionality: Add Unicode NFKC normalization to prevent homoglyph attacks
Block null bytes and validate length
security_controls: Add docstring warning about shell=True danger

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use unicodedata.normalize('NFKC', command). Add patterns: $(, ${, {, }, null byte, Unicode whitespace. Document shell=False requirement.
tasks.test_strategy: Property-based testing with hypothesis. Test all OWASP command injection patterns. Verify subprocess.run uses shell=False.
tasks.notes: Critical - command injection can lead to full system compromise

tasks.title: Fix path traversal vulnerabilities across modules

files_to_modify.description: Fix TOCTOU race, symlink handling, encoded paths

core_functionality: Handle symlinks securely (don't follow or validate target)
Use content hashing to prevent TOCTOU
Validate resolved paths against allowed directories
security_controls: Block symlinks or validate their targets
Block UNC paths and alternate data streams (Windows)

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use urllib.parse.unquote() before validation. Add is_symlink() check. Compute SHA256 hash of file content. Validate resolved path with .relative_to().
tasks.test_strategy: Test with %2e%2e, symlinks, race conditions (threading). Verify all path operations use centralized validator.
tasks.notes: Critical - affects multiple modules, can expose sensitive files

tasks.title: Fix cache key collision vulnerability

files_to_modify.description: Include system_prompt and tools in cache key generation

core_functionality: Sort tools list for deterministic hashing
Include all parameters in SHA256 hash
security_controls: Different prompts with different tools get different keys
Different system prompts get different keys
testing: Test same prompt with different system_prompt → different keys
Test same prompt with different tools → different keys

tasks.implementation_guidance: Update generate_key signature to accept system_prompt and tools. Add to request dict before JSON serialization. Sort tools list.
tasks.test_strategy: Unit tests with identical prompts but different system_prompt/tools. Verify cache misses occur correctly.
tasks.notes: Critical - cache poisoning can return malicious responses to users

tasks.title: Fix Jinja2 template injection vulnerability

files_to_modify.description: Add variable validation and type checking

core_functionality: Whitelist allowed variable types (str, int, float, bool, list, dict)
testing: Fuzz test with Burp SSTI payloads

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create _validate_variables() method. Check isinstance() for allowed types. Add length validation. Document risks in docstring.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all known SSTI bypass techniques. Verify sandbox cannot be escaped. Test with polyglot payloads.
tasks.notes: Critical - SSTI can lead to arbitrary code execution

tasks.title: Secure dynamic tool loading mechanism

files_to_modify.description: Add strict validation, signatures, sandboxing for _load_tools_from_config

core_functionality: Strict regex validation for tool names ([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)
Sandbox tool execution in separate processes
Audit logging for all tool loads

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add TOOL_NAME_PATTERN regex. Implement signature verification with public key. Use multiprocessing for sandboxing. Log to security audit trail.
tasks.test_strategy: Attempt to load tools with shell metacharacters. Test with unsigned tools. Verify sandboxed execution cannot affect parent process.
tasks.notes: Critical - arbitrary code execution risk in multi-tenant environments

tasks.title: Fix ReDoS vulnerabilities in security patterns

files_to_modify.description: Rewrite regex patterns to avoid catastrophic backtracking

core_functionality: Replace nested quantifiers with specific character classes
Validate input length before regex matching
security_controls: All patterns complete in O(n) time
testing: Test with ReDoS payloads (evil regex patterns)
Use rxxr2 tool to analyze patterns

tasks.implementation_guidance: Replace r"ignore[\s._\-|]+(all[\s._\-|]+)?" with r"\bignore\s+all\s+previous\b". Add max_length=100_000 check. Use regex library with timeout.
tasks.test_strategy: Generate ReDoS attack strings (aaaa...aaab). Measure execution time. Verify timeout mechanism works.
tasks.notes: Critical - ReDoS can cause service outages

tasks.title: Implement prompt/response sanitization before storage

files_to_modify.description: Add sanitization before storing LLM prompts/responses

core_functionality: Detect and redact API keys (sk-*, xox*, AKIA*)
Detect and mask PII (emails, SSNs, credit cards)
Add is_sanitized flag to track processing
testing: Test with prompts containing API keys

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create _sanitize_sensitive_data() method. Use regex patterns from secret_detection. Add size checks. Set is_sanitized metadata flag.
tasks.test_strategy: Insert test data with known secrets. Query database and verify all secrets redacted. Test PII detection accuracy.
tasks.notes: Critical - GDPR/HIPAA compliance risk, credential exposure

tasks.title: Fix HTTP client memory leak

files_to_modify.description: Enforce context manager usage, add monitoring

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add ResourceWarning in __del__. Document context manager requirement. Add connection pool metrics. Implement weakref.finalize() cleanup.
tasks.test_strategy: Create 1000 clients without closing. Monitor file descriptors with lsof. Verify warnings appear. Test cleanup on process termination.
tasks.notes: High - resource leaks cause production crashes

tasks.title: Add execution timeouts to prevent unbounded loops

files_to_modify.description: Implement total execution timeout and cost budgets

testing: Test with loops that exceed timeout

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use signal.SIGALRM for timeout. Track cumulative tokens/costs. Implement TokenBudget class. Add CircuitBreaker integration.
tasks.test_strategy: Create agent that loops indefinitely. Verify timeout triggers. Test token budget exhaustion. Verify circuit opens after failures.
tasks.notes: High - prevents DoS and runaway costs
